title: WebhookConfig missing Clone derive; Debug is manual to redact key
description: config::WebhookConfig has a manual Debug impl (to redact the key field) but does not derive Clone. The rest of the config types (FeedConfig, WatchConfig) derive Clone. The missing Clone means WebhookConfig cannot be stored in any collection that needs cloning, and callers must work around it. The manual Debug is correct for security reasons (redacting the key) but Clone is entirely safe to derive and is simply missing. The WatchConfig.pattern field is also a String used only for glob matching — a small newtype (GlobPattern(String)) would make invalid patterns unrepresentable.
